mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iam_user (tenant_id, username, password_hash, display_name, status, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, version) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{code}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, 'ACTIVE', #{now}, #{operatorId}, #{now}, #{operatorId}, 0, 0)

INSERT INTO iam_role (tenant_id, role_code, role_name, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, version) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{now}, #{operatorId}, #{now}, #{operatorId}, 0, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM iam_permission WHERE permission_code LIKE 'tenant:%'
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM iam_permission WHERE permission_code=#{code})
